prompt: A high-quality 3x3 sprite sheet of StarCraft II Zerg style ability icons on a white background. Each icon in a clear cell. Icons: Move (green arrow), Stop (red X), Hold (yellow shield), Patrol (blue path), Attack (red claws), Gather (green crystal), Build (biological construction), Repair (biological healing), Cancel (circle with slash). Style: organic, insectoid, glowing, vibrant. Detailed game assets.
